title: 'It might be time to look at Framework laptops': I'm worried about the future of MacBooks as Apple fans rebel against M7 chip rumors
summary: The harder pill to swallow is the harsher MacBook Air price hikes, and as we pointed out a few weeks back, some wallet-friendly Windows 11 laptops now look a lot more tempting after Apple's price increases.
